title: OD Touchpoints: Prevalence, Frequency, and Recency
notes: The underlying data for the Fatal Drug Overdose Touchpoints Dashboard. This data includes metrics on prevalence, frequency, and recency of a touchpoint in relation to a fatal overdose, viewable by County.
